description_long: This wardrobe features a tall, rectangular structure with a rich, dark wood grain finish, giving it a modern and elegant appearance. The front face is divided into two main vertical sections: a larger door on the left and a slightly narrower door on the right, with four horizontal lines on the lower right suggesting the presence of drawers. The surface is smooth and the wood grain pattern runs vertically, enhancing its visual height. The sides and back are solid and unadorned, finished in a very dark, almost black color. There are no visible handles, indicating a minimalist design, possibly with push-to-open mechanisms. The wardrobe is likely constructed from engineered wood or plywood with a veneer finish, and is designed to store clothing and personal items.
description: A tall, modern wardrobe with a dark wood grain finish, two main doors, and four subtle drawer lines, featuring a minimalist, handle-less design.
description_view_0: The front view shows the wardrobe's two main doors and four horizontal drawer lines on the lower right, with a vertical wood grain pattern.
description_view_1: The left side view reveals a solid, flat, dark-colored panel with no visible features or openings.
description_view_2: The back view displays a plain, dark surface with no visible details or textures.
description_view_3: The right side view is similar to the left, showing a solid, flat, dark panel with no distinguishing features.
